SAGE.notes: PICK #494 NEXT — Phase 2 of email brand redesign. Phase 1 SHIPPED (9c23a71): layout.ts created + 10 templates migrated to renderLayout (order-confirmation, payment-confirmed, 4 order-status flows, shipping-notification, newsletter-welcome, email-change-verify, email-change notice, account-deleted, wishlist-sold). REMAINING in src/lib/email.ts — 11 raw `<!DOCTYPE html>` builders at lines 737/1124/1361/1466/1623/1731/1836/1925/2072/2239/2582. Map each builder to renderLayout({preheader, contentHtml}) or a `buildEmailLayout`-style helper from layout.ts. Expected builders: line 737 admin-new-order, 1124 newsletter/welcome-variant, 1361 review-request, 1466 delivery-check, 1623 new-arrival, 1731 browse-abandonment, 1836 cross-sell-follow-up, 1925 win-back, 2072 campaign, 2239 MOTHERS_DAY_BUILDERS (5 emails), 2582 CUSTOMS_BUILDERS (n emails). APPROACH: one builder per commit (OR two per commit if trivial <30 lines each) — keep atomic to dodge QA exit=143, preserve lint 0w/0e MILESTONE on every commit. For each builder: (1) lift innerContent out of the DOCTYPE shell, (2) feed through renderLayout with matching preheader/title/eyebrow/CTA props, (3) ensure Czech diacritics + unsubscribe link are preserved (campaign/newsletter/browse-abandonment/win-back/cross-sell/MOTHERS_DAY/CUSTOMS are marketing-class → MUST have unsubscribe footer), (4) transactional (admin-new-order, review-request, delivery-check, new-arrival) skip unsubscribe. DO NOT touch non-email files (homepage sections #481, cookie-banner #483, product-gallery #482, PDP sold layout #489, globals.css lightbox #488, invoice generators #490, jarvis-remote-frame #492).
